summary: Executed backend pytest suite and frontend Playwright flows for overview, targets, policies, runs, run detail tabs, evidence save/copy, OpenAI draft generation, reports, settings, and audit log. Backend APIs passed; frontend has a critical clipboard-triggered runtime crash.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking copy in evidence section throws uncaught runtime error when clipboard permission is denied, triggering React error overlay and blocking continued workflow in-session.

integration_issues.issue: For newly created runs with no findings, findings area renders as effectively blank without a visible empty-state message, reducing operator clarity.

issues: Recharts emits repeated width/height -1 console warnings on initial load, indicating chart container sizing instability during first render.

action_items: Wrap all clipboard writes in try/catch in CopyBlock and run-detail section copy buttons; show non-blocking toast on permission denial instead of throwing.
Add explicit empty-state UI for Findings tab when no findings exist.
Stabilize chart container sizing to remove Recharts width/height warnings on first render.
critical_code_review_comments: Unhandled navigator.clipboard.writeText promise rejection can crash the UI surface (PAGE ERROR observed).
Run detail empty findings path lacks user-facing empty-state guidance.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed targets/runs/policy line during automated testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is in /app/backend/tests/test_redteam_core_api.py and currently all pass. Frontend flows pass except copy-button permission handling; reproduce by denying clipboard permission and clicking evidence copy button in run detail.
rca of the issue: RCA: Copy handlers directly call navigator.clipboard.writeText without error handling. In automation/browser contexts where clipboard permission is denied, this throws NotAllowedError, causing an uncaught runtime error overlay. Repro: create/open run detail -> Evidence tab -> click copy button -> observe PAGE ERROR 'Failed to execute writeText on Clipboard: Write permission denied'. Mitigation: catch rejection and surface toast error; avoid throwing in event handler.
